settings.heading: Thank You For Celebrating New Year's Eve at The Londoner with Luxury London Events!
New Year's Eve Masquerade Ball and Party 2025 at The Londoner Hotel

settings.text:
After a sold-out event in 2024, we’re excited to return with the second edition of our exclusive New Year’s Eve Masquerade Ball and Party at the five-star Londoner Hotel in Leicester Square. Formerly hosted at The Dorchester, Hilton Park Lane and The Sheraton, this year’s celebration on 31st December 2025 promises an unforgettable night of elegance and entertainment in one of London’s most prestigious venues.

Last Few Party Only Tickets Remaining

Arrive from 21:30 and step straight into the New Year’s Eve Masquerade Party at The Londoner
Hotel, London’s most exclusive celebration in the heart of the West End.

Experience the electric atmosphere across two floors — the Ballroom (after-dinner) and The Gallery (Chillout Room) — featuring a Live Band, DJs, and midnight celebrations streamed from Big Ben.

Enjoy a night of luxury with entertainment, dancing, and midnight snacks.

Party until 02:30am at London’s premier New Year’s Eve after-dinner celebration.

Last Entry: 23:55

LAST FEW TICKETS REMAINING!

Expect live music hosted by The Bando and a vibrant party atmosphere expertly curated by Dj Rugrat, with a live stream of Big Ben’s countdown and the London fireworks on giant 4x6 metre LED screens. 

This is London’s ultimate New Year’s Eve experience.

Early booking is essential as this event will sell out.

settings.custom_liquid:
Not every New Year's Eve is worth remembering. Most are overpriced, overcrowded, and done by midnight. This one is different.

The NYE Mayfair Masquerade is London's most exclusive New Year's Eve ball — a sold-out black-tie evening at The Londoner Hotel in Leicester Square. Champagne on arrival. A three-course gala dinner in the Ballroom. Live band, DJs, and midnight celebrations streamed live from Big Ben on 4×6 metre LED screens as 700 people count down together. The 2025 event sold out months before the night.

2026 tickets are available now.

Secure Your Place →

What Is the NYE Mayfair Masquerade?

A black-tie masquerade ball and gala dinner on New Year's Eve, held at The Londoner Hotel — a five-star boutique hotel at the heart of London's West End. The event runs 7pm until 2:30am across three floors of the venue, with 360 dinner guests and up to 340 after-party guests sharing one of the best rooms in the city on the best night of the year.

The event launched in 2019 at The Dorchester. It has sold out every single year since. The crowd that comes is people who have done the mediocre NYE and chosen not to do it again.

The Evening — What Happens and When

7:00pm — The Reception

Arrive into The Londoner's Gold Room for a Moët & Chandon champagne and canapé reception. The hotel sets the tone immediately — boutique five-star atmosphere, and the particular buzz of a room full of people who have all made the same good decision.

7:45pm — The Ballroom

The Ballroom doors open. The Bando Band take the stage. Three-course dinner begins at 8:15pm, served to your table while the band plays. Free-flowing wine for Silver guests. Open bar for Gold and Platinum.

9:30pm — The Party

After-party guests arrive. DJ Rugrat takes over. Two floors open — the Ballroom and The Gallery — each with its own DJ. The party runs until 2:30am.

12:00am — Midnight

The Big Ben countdown plays live on 4×6 metre LED screens. 700 people in the Ballroom welcome the new year together. It is exactly what New Year's Eve should feel like.

Choose Your Tickets

Silver Dinner & Party — £425 per person

Champagne reception, three-course dinner with free-flowing wine, live band, DJs, midnight countdown, midnight snacks, party until 2:30am.

Gold Dinner & Party — [CONFIRM PRICE]

Everything in Silver plus premium seating, table waiter service, and complimentary open bar throughout dinner.

Platinum Dinner & Party — [CONFIRM PRICE]

Best seats in the Ballroom, complete open bar, full waiter service all evening.

After Party Only — [CONFIRM PRICE]

Arrive from 9:30pm. Both floors. Live DJs, midnight countdown, snacks, party until 2:30am. Last entry 11:55pm.

View All Tickets & Book Now →

What Our Guests Say

"The most memorable New Year's Eve I've had in London. The venue, the crowd, the atmosphere — everything was exactly right. Already booked for next year."

— Repeat guest, booked 3 years running

"I flew in from Tokyo specifically for this. Until you're standing in that Ballroom at midnight with the entire room counting down — you don't fully get it. Worth every hour of the journey."

— Yuki T., Tokyo, Japan

"We've done Times Square. We've done Vegas. Nothing comes close to being in an actual ballroom with 700 people who all decided to do New Year's right."

— Marcus & Diane, San Francisco, USA

"Genuinely the best crowd I've ever been in on NYE. Exactly the type of people you want to be around when the clock strikes midnight."

— Guest, 2025

"The attention to detail is exceptional. The reception, dinner service, the atmosphere at midnight — this has the quality of a proper luxury event."

— Khalid A., Dubai

"Came over from Toronto with five friends for a milestone birthday. Seating sorted perfectly, most brilliant table. Back for 2026."

— Sarah K., Toronto, Canada

Common Questions

Is the dress code strictly black tie?

Smart suits or black tie for men. Cocktail dresses or evening wear for ladies. No sportswear or trainers. Masks are encouraged, available on the night from £15.

Can I sit with friends who bought tickets separately?

Yes — same ticket tier only. After booking, email Order IDs to support@newyearsevelondon.co.uk and we'll seat you together.

What time should I arrive?

Dinner guests: by 7:15pm. After-party guests: from 9:30pm. Last entry strictly 11:55pm.

Does the event sell out?

Every year since 2019. 700 places for 2026. Book early.

View the full FAQ →

New Year's Eve 2026 at The Londoner Hotel, Leicester Square

The Londoner Hotel is at 50 Whitcomb Street — two minutes from Leicester Square tube (Northern and Piccadilly lines). Five-star boutique. One night a year, the Ballroom becomes London's best NYE room.

Book Your Table for 2026 →

settings.title: Silver Seating Dinner and Party Ticket
settings.text: Silver tickets include a champagne and canape reception, three course seasonal menu in the Ballroom and free-flowing red and white house wine during dinner service.

settings.title: Gold Seating Dinner and Party Ticket
settings.text: Seated on the second row from the dancefloor, Gold tickets include a champagne and canape reception, three course seasonal menu in the Ballroom, free-flowing paired wines, champagne, beers, and soft drinks during dinner service and waiter table service during dinner service.

settings.title: Platinum Seating Dinner and Party Ticket
settings.text: Seated closest to the dancefloor, Platinum tickets include a champagne and canape reception, three course seasonal menu in the Ballroom, free-flowing paired wines, champagne, beers, and soft drinks during dinner service and waiter table service during dinner service.

settings.title: Party Only Tickets
settings.text: Join the party from 21:30 with access to the Ballroom (after dinner service), and The Gallery, and enjoy snacks at midnight.

settings.heading: Event Highlights
settings.row_content:
Date: 31st December 2025

Doors Open: 19:00, Dinner: 20:15

Party Only Entrance: 21:30,

Doors Close: 23:55, Party Ends: 02:30

Location: The Londoner Hotel, Leicester Square, London, WC2H 7DX

Capacity: 700 guests across two stunning floors – The Ballroom, and The Gallery (there is no access to the Rooftop)

Entertainment: Live performances, entertainment, and DJ sets. Live stream of the Big Ben countdown and fireworks on 4x6m screens in the Ballroom

settings.heading: Seating
settings.row_content:
Q. How many guests are there per table?

A. Each table seats 12 guests (Dinner Guests Only) in the ballroom and for any bookings less than 12, you would be required to share with other guests

Unreserved seating is available in The Gallery Floor for Party Only Guests.

Q. I have purchased my ticket separately from friends?

A. Please email your order ID's to support@newyearsevelondon.co.uk and we will ensure you are sat together

settings.heading: Dietary Requirements
settings.row_content: Please advise us of any dietary requirements and/or allergens by emailing support@newyearsevelondon.co.uk

settings.heading: Terms and Conditions
settings.row_content:
The Londoner will be operating a card only bar for the duration of the evening.

Silver Guests receive complimentary House Wines during dinner service.

Gold & Platinum Dinner Guests receive complimentary Champagne, Beer and House Wines during dinner service.

Please note, late arriving dinner guests after 8.10pm will miss out on certain dinner courses and no alternative will be offered.

There is no access to the Hotel's rooftop.

This event is 18+. I.D will be required on the door.

Attendance by younger guests is only permitted by prior arrangement via support@newyearsevelondon.co.uk

Last Entry Strictly at 23:55

Our Masquerade Event has limited availability; tickets must be pre-booked in advance and pre-payment is required. 

Tickets are strictly non-refundable under any circumstances.
